title: microcybe multiflora subsp. baccharoides
intro: Microcybe multiflora subsp. baccharoides, also known as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, is a rare plant native to South America. The medicinal properties of Microcybe multiflora subsp. baccharoides include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of terpenoids and flavonoids. The health benefits of this plant are said to include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Microcybe multiflora subsp. baccharoides is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
